subject: fix(ui): prevent burger menu overlapping search button in header
body:
On narrow screens, the filter buttons + burger menu exceeded available width,
causing the burger icon to visually overlap the search pill. Fixed by:
- Removing maxWidth: 200 from search button (let it truly flex-fill)
- Adding flexShrink: 0 to filter buttons and burger wrapper (prevent squishing)
- Replacing marginRight: 15 on burger with flexShrink: 0 (header has its own padding)
- Adding marginHorizontal: 0 to headerTitleContainerStyle (prevent React Navigation default margins)

Tags: ui, layout, header, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: header-layout
Semver: patch
